title: カワカミプリンセス登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My days of training with Kawakami Princess are
finally about to begin! Today, we'll start with...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whoooa?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek! Magical Princess is already available for
rental?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course, my all-time fav will always be the original series! Especially episode eight, with that one-on-one battle for the ages! Fists flying everywhere!
choice_data_list: Umm, where have you brought me?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A video rental shop, of course! They have the
complete box set of Princess Fighter here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you said you wanted me to tell you more
about myself, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to the events leading up to this
moment. It all started earlier today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I called Kawakami Princess to my office first thing
in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My goal was to learn more about her, particularly
what her preferred running style and track type
were—information vital to our upcoming training.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm here. So what is it?
choice_data_list: I'd like you to tell me more about yourself.
I'd like you to tell me more about yourself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my! I see, I see... I hear you loooud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then what are we waiting for? Come on! Let's get
to it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: If you want to know more about me, you have to start with the first gen! Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When I was little, I would wake up early every
Sunday, rubbing my sleepy eyes as I studied how
to be a princess by watching the heroic Princess
Fighter.
choice_data_list: Hold on... I need a moment to process this...
Hold on... I need a moment to process this...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sure, I'll wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This "Princess Fighter" Kawakami Princess is
talking about is a cartoon that airs on Sunday
mornings. The heroine serves as the model
princess that Kawakami aspires to become.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what I want to know about her has nothing to
do with Princess Fighter...
choice_data_list:
What I meant was, I'd like to know more about
your running...

What I meant was, I'd like to know more about
your running...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Running? My running?
choice_data_list: Yeah. We need to think about your debut race.
Yeah. We need to think about your debut race.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My debut race? Oh, I see. Then...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ngyaaah?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm so stupid! I completely misunderstood you,
didn't I?! Ohhhh, I always jump the gun!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back to your office right away! I'll tell
you everything you want to know. I'll even give
demonstrations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she's done talking, Kawakami Princess
bolts out of the shop, leaving me behind once
again.

text_block_list.name: Monitor
text_block_list.text: "A princess is always beautiful, graceful, and courageous! Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter! A dreamer's journey never ends!"
choice_data_list:
So this is the Princess Fighter she adores so
much...

So this is the Princess Fighter she adores so
much...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A little later that afternoon, we start our training
session. I set things up based on the information
she gave me about her running.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Raaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... How was... that... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I compare what I just saw of her running with the
information she gave me beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than short or long-distance tracks, she
seems suited to mile or medium distances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But above all, she possesses the spirit to face
challenges head-on. When it comes time for a
race against real opponents, I'm sure she'll burn
with fiery passion.
choice_data_list:
"You can become stronger than a raging
tempest."

"You can become stronger than a raging
tempest."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Uwah?! Th-that was...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was the line Legendary Trainer says in
episode sixteen! When Princess Fighter is locked
in battle with an enemy Stopra and needs words
of... encouragement...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wait! How come you know that line, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: I thought I'd study up on the series a bit.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I wanted to understand the ideal you aspire to.
I wanted to understand the ideal you aspire to.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh my!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Eheh... eheheh. ♪ Your efforts are very much
appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm going to run another lap! Watch me,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Rrryaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess lets out a fierce roar as she
continues to run with a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her charge furiously ahead, she seems
to shine brilliantly with the determination to
become her ideal princess.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Her candor is no doubt her greatest asset.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Yes, it is I! The first-rate Umamusume,
King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The self-proclaimed first-rate Umamusume, King
Halo is a racer currently in her senior year.
Kawakami Princess views her as an idol.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And you would be...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I see. Then I expect you to heed my words even
more closely.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Candor like hers can be a source of powerful
strength, but also a great vulnerability.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to train her with care and attention.
You'd be surprised how important that can be to
an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's no fair, Trainer! NO FAIR! How could you
start talking with King and leave me out?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let me join in, too! If you don't, I won't talk to
you anymore!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It seems that candor of hers is already
starting to backfire...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I begin my journey to take on the Twinkle
Series with the spunky Kawakami Princess.
